creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
(In reply to comment #0)
> - Add patch to fix CVE-2018-8740 for uppsrc/plugin/sqlite3/lib/sqlite3.c,
> similar to ports r465275 changes
Just for note:
The uppsrc/plugin/sqlite3 was updated to 3.23.0 version in 11880 revision:
https://github.com/ultimatepp/mirror/commit/19cdbaaecbbd0bcffa1ab4597a62577064e59c66

Therefore, the mentioned patch can be removed after next release.
